ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline – 25th March
ham.body:
Dear Students,

This is a friendly reminder that the final semester project submission deadline is on 25th March, 2024. Kripya ensure that you submit your project report in PDF format via the LMS by 5:00 PM on that day.

If you encounter any issues or need clarification, feel free to email me or drop by my office hours (Mon & Wed, 2-4 PM) at campus.

Good luck with your projects!

Warm regards,
Prof. Rajesh Kumar
Department of Computer Science

spam.subject: Urgent: Your CryptoWallet Account Suspended – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We regret to inform you that your CryptoWallet account (Account ID: 1234567890) has been temporarily suspended due to suspicious activity. To avoid permanent closure, kindly verify your identity within the next 24 hours by clicking the link below and completing the verification process.

<URL>

If you do not act promptly, your crypto assets may be permanently locked. This is a security measure to protect your funds.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best regards,
Security Team
CryptoWallet Inc.
